stemHtml: Which statement is correct regarding nose wheel steering using the tiller or rudder pedals?

options.a: Nose-wheel steering also works when using the rudder pedals in flight.
options.b: The steering angle is the same when using the rudder pedals or nose-wheel steering tiller.
options.c: When checking the rudder during taxi, the pilot has to consider nose-wheel turn.
options.d: Pedals and nosewheel are usually disconnected during taxi.
